ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Current governor of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., State Senate - 6) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., State Senate, Council Member) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of government (e.g., State, Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party (e.g., Republican, Democratic) */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party (e.g., Conservative, Liberal) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "hq_location" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the official is elected */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office held by the official */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the official's performance */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the official */,
  "portrait_url" TEXT /* URL to the official's portrait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_information" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the official */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the official */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_information_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative action */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., introduced, voted for, voted against) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast by the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_history_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_history_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_name" TEXT /* Name of the bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bill */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., pending, passed, rejected) */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "sponsored_by" TEXT /* Name of the official sponsoring the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings_history" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the official's performance */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., polling organization, expert review) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to evaluate the official's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_history_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official profile being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the profile */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials_offices" (
  "official_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official-office relationship */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the official started serving in the office */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the official ended serving in the office (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the official in the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_offices_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_offices_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials_ratings" (
  "official_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official-rating relationship */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., polling organization, expert review) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the rating was given (e.g., election, policy issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_ratings_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings_history ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_ratings_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., General Election 2024) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, midterm, local) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state in which the election took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials_elections" (
  "official_election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official-election relationship */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the official was running for */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes the official received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_elections_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_elections_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)
